name: @ehrbase-ui/openehr-aql
description: openEHR AQL 1.1.0 — complete, symmetric library: typed query AST, combinator builders, serializer (AST → AQL string) + parameter collector, hand-written recursive-descent parser (AQL string → AST), and identifier-level validation (RM class / archetype id / node code / $param) against @ehrbase-ui/openehr-rm + openehr-am.
